title: Weather2 Additions
description: Small additions mod for the Weather2 mod by Corosus
body:
![The cable update banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0dfce513102c391fe1571b765f951e8924c3717.png)

A small additions mod for the [Weather2/Weather Storms & Tornadoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/weather-storms-tornadoes) mod by [Corosus](https://modrinth.com/user/Corosus).

This mod aims to improve the Weather2 experience with new mechanics and technology that allow the user to better track weather events.

The tablet allows for storm tracking, similar to the weather radar from the 1.12.2 build of the Weather2 mod.

![The Tablet item; an item that allows for tracking and monitoring storms as well as mapping the surrounding area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a3edc7f266f3447a625e6ec59eb18c9bea21a17.png)

The mod also comes with a small battery block to charge your tablet, which can be powered by the Weather2 Wind turbine.

![The small battery block interface - shows the output and input through item slots as well as the amount of energy stored and the total input/output](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22f86f387dfb638f6f85a14d539f60f40b687f45.png)

The radar block helps map the surrounding area by loading their chunks temporarily.

![The interface of the radar menu, displaying plotted pixels on a screen of the surrounding area, as well as the rate of consumption, the energy and the radius at which it maps at](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d18c3a6fb091f3b819695d638ea9fe44e6a78f06.webp)

Everything is able to be powered through the usage of cables and wind turbines (available from the Weather2 mod).

![An image showing the usage of cables; some are connected to a wind turbine, which leads into the top of a battery block, and some coming out of the bottom of the battery block, leading into a radar block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7074f436ab5389ed58e267c3506cf56bbbef6350.webp)

Cables and their internal buffer can be monitored through the Network Analyser tool;

![The interface of the network analyser, showing the throughput of the cable and the internal energy buffer, as well as the number of cables in the network](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8970a9ffcf20d0f7e609e3fd384be666b02357f.webp)
